title: Digests
description: A generated, curated roundup of the best recent articles for a period (daily or weekly), assembled by the editorial curator.

title.description: the digest headline shown in the archive

summary.description: a one-paragraph deck summarizing what this digest covers

period.description: 'daily' or 'weekly' — the cadence this digest covers

status.description: 'building' while the curator assembles it, 'ready' when complete, 'error' on failure

articleCount.description: how many articles the digest includes

items.description: the ordered article slots in this digest

newsletters.description: rendered newsletter editions built from this digest
